## What and why
<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## How it was tested
<!-- Which checks you ran locally. -->
- [ ] Backend: `./gradlew spotlessApply test`
- [ ] UI (`ui/`): `npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build`
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Docs updated (README / AGENT.md / docs/BACKLOG.md) if behaviour or scope changed

## Notes
<!-- Trade-offs, follow-ups, anything a reviewer should know. -->
